- #2036 — Verify: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE: fix oauth-migration (from PR #1030 acme/mobile)
- #2037 — Verify: Image uploads time out over 5MB: add test for image-uploads (from PR #1033 acme/infra)
- #2038 — Verify: SSO SCIM provisioning errors: refactor sso-provisioning (from PR #1037 acme/web)

I scanned all 15 merged PRs and only those whose body contains "Closes ENG-…" qualified (the other 6 didn't reference a Linear issue).
